tests.description: Test the greet function with name Adit and approve the interrupt

interruptHandlers.expectedMessage: Agent wants to call the greet function with name: Adit

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: Make sure the math in the string looks correct.

tests.description: Test the greet function with name Adit and reject the interrupt

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt:
The response text should make it clear that the interrupt was rejected. Any of the following or their variations are valid responses and should result in a perfect score:

"I'm unable to process the request at the moment."
"The tool call was rejected." etc. It does not need to explicitly state that the request was rejected, though it can. Either way, as long as it's clear that the request won't be processed, it should receive a perfect score.

interruptHandlers.expectedMessage: Agent wants to call the greet function with name: Adit
